# RACI Matrix for OctoAcme Projects

A RACI matrix clarifies who is **R**esponsible, **A**ccountable, **C**onsulted, and **I**nformed for key project activities.

## Definitions
- **Responsible (R)**: Does the work to complete the task
- **Accountable (A)**: Ultimately answerable for completion and has veto power (only one A per activity)
- **Consulted (C)**: Provides input and expertise
- **Informed (I)**: Kept updated on progress

## Project Initiation Phase

| Activity | PM | PdM | Dev | Scrum Master | Release Mgr | UX | Data Analyst | Support Lead | QA |
|----------|----|----|-----|--------------|-------------|----|--------------|--------------|----|
| Create Project One-pager | R | A | C | I | I | C | C | I | I |
| Define Success Metrics | C | A | C | I | I | C | R | I | I |
| Stakeholder Alignment | R | A | I | I | I | C | I | I | I |
| Resource Planning | A | C | R | R | R | R | R | R | R |
| Risk Identification | R | C | C | C | C | C | C | C | C |

## Planning Phase

| Activity | PM | PdM | Dev | Scrum Master | Release Mgr | UX | Data Analyst | Support Lead | QA |
|----------|----|----|-----|--------------|-------------|----|--------------|--------------|----|
| Backlog Grooming | C | A | C | R | I | C | I | I | C |
| Sprint Planning | C | C | R | A | I | C | C | I | C |
| Design Creation | I | C | C | I | I | A | I | I | I |
| Estimation | I | C | R | A | I | C | C | I | C |
| Release Planning | R | C | C | C | A | I | I | I | C |
| Test Plan Creation | I | C | C | I | I | I | I | I | A |

## Execution Phase

| Activity | PM | PdM | Dev | Scrum Master | Release Mgr | UX | Data Analyst | Support Lead | QA |
|----------|----|----|-----|--------------|-------------|----|--------------|--------------|----|
| Daily Standups | C | I | R | A | I | R | I | I | R |
| Feature Implementation | I | C | A | C | I | C | I | I | C |
| Code Review | I | I | A | I | I | C | I | I | I |
| Design Review | I | C | C | I | I | A | I | I | I |
| Testing | I | C | C | I | I | I | I | I | A |
| Analytics Setup | I | C | C | I | I | I | A | I | C |
| Risk Management | A | C | C | C | C | I | C | I | I |
| Status Reporting | A | C | I | C | C | I | C | I | I |
| Blocker Resolution | R | C | C | A | C | I | I | I | I |

## Release Phase

| Activity | PM | PdM | Dev | Scrum Master | Release Mgr | UX | Data Analyst | Support Lead | QA |
|----------|----|----|-----|--------------|-------------|----|--------------|--------------|----|
| Release Notes | C | C | C | I | A | I | I | C | I |
| Deployment | C | I | R | I | A | I | I | I | C |
| Go/No-Go Decision | C | C | C | I | A | I | I | I | C |
| Smoke Testing | I | I | C | I | C | C | I | I | A |
| Support Briefing | I | C | C | I | C | I | I | A | I |
| Knowledge Base Update | I | C | C | I | I | I | I | A | I |
| Metrics Verification | I | C | I | I | I | I | A | I | I |

## Post-Release Phase

| Activity | PM | PdM | Dev | Scrum Master | Release Mgr | UX | Data Analyst | Support Lead | QA |
|----------|----|----|-----|--------------|-------------|----|--------------|--------------|----|
| Retrospective | C | C | R | A | C | C | C | C | C |
| User Feedback Collection | I | C | I | I | I | C | C | A | I |
| Success Metrics Review | C | A | I | I | I | I | R | C | I |
| Support Issue Triage | I | C | R | I | I | I | I | A | C |
| Action Item Tracking | R | I | C | A | I | I | I | I | I |

## Notes
- This matrix represents typical assignments; actual projects may vary
- Multiple people can share R (Responsible) for collaborative activities
- Only one person should be A (Accountable) per activity
- Adjust based on team size and project complexity
- Use this as a starting point and customize for your specific project needs
